mapper.insert: INSERT INTO family_bind (family_user_id, elder_id, elder_user_id, relation, status, create_time) VALUES (#{familyUserId}, #{elderId}, #{elderUserId}, #{relation}, #{status}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE family_bind SET status = 0 WHERE family_user_id = #{familyUserId} AND elder_id = #{elderId} AND status = 1
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM family_bind WHERE family_user_id = #{familyUserId} AND status = 1
